Estimated Grey Seal Abundance (ea_data)

Source: R/data-documentation.R
grey_seals.Rd

Abundance of grey seals in Canadian waters, assessed as a single stock. Derived from aerial surveys, corrected for survey timing, coverage, and haul-out proportion.

Usage

data(grey_seals)

data(grey_seals_2021)

Format

An ea_data object with:

data

A tibble:

year

Year (numeric)

value

Median estimate (count)

low

Lower 95percent credible interval

high

Upper 95percent credible interval

meta

A named list with:

data_type

"Grey Seal Abundance"

region

"Scotian Shelf"

location_descriptor

"Sable Island / Scotian Shelf"

units

"count"

species

"Halichoerus grypus"

source_citation

Hammill et al. (2023)

original_value_col

Character. "median"

An object of class ea_data of length 1.

Source

Hammill et al. (2023), see data-raw/grey-seals/grey-seals.R

Author

Andrew Edwards, Nell den Heyer

On this page

Developed by Jamie C. Tam, Benoit Casault, Stephanie Clay, Adam Cook, Remi Daigle, Andrew M. Edwards, Jaimie Harbin, Brad Hubley, Keith David, Mike McMahon, Emily A. O’Grady.
